name: react-searchable-dropdown-monorepo
description: A reusable React searchable dropdown component monorepo.

scripts.build: bun run build:lib && bun run build:docs
scripts.build:docs: bun run --filter react-searchable-dropdown-docs build && cp packages/docs/public/.assetsignore packages/docs/dist/.assetsignore
scripts.npm: bun run build:lib && cd packages/library && npm publish --access public
scripts.npm:test: bun run build:lib && cd packages/library && npm pack --dry-run

author: Lucio D'Alessandro
